notes:
Game will load indefinitely after the Unreal Engine logo unless ?nologos is entered as a custom launch option.

Multiplayer works perfectly. Singleplayer campaign does not work at all. The game hangs indefinitely when starting a singleplayer mission because the video cutscenes do not play under Wine. This is a known issue with Unreal Engine needing a 'native video player' (i.e. Windows Media Player) to play the videos and there is currently no solution or workaround.
title: Strike Vector EX
